---
title: "iPhone and iPad Approved for Classified NATO Information"
description: "The first and only consumer devices to meet these international government security standards."
author: "synesis"
date: "2026-02-26"
categories: [Apple, iPhone, iPad, security, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Cover image from the Apple Newsroom announcement. ([Source](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/02/iphone-and-ipad-approved-to-handle-classified-nato-information/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

The first and only consumer devices to meet these international government security standards [[1]](#ref-1).

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "iPhone and iPad approved to handle classified NATO information." *Apple Newsroom*, February 2026. <https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/02/iphone-and-ipad-approved-to-handle-classified-nato-information/>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_iphone-and-ipad-approved-to-handle-classified-activity-7433020333361893376-1Gso).*
